steps: File tax reclaim with ABN AMRO Custody for EUR 22,193.60 overpaid withholding tax on Unilever NV (UNA)
Submit Norwegian tax residency certificate and NL-NO treaty documentation showing 15% rate applies
Reference ISIN NL0000009355 and payment date in reclaim to ensure proper processing
Follow up with ABN AMRO within 30 days if no acknowledgment of the EUR 22,193.60 reclaim request
